name: Can you build a knowledge graph if my data is messy or incomplete?

mainEntity.name: Can you build a knowledge graph if my data is messy or incomplete?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if your raw data contains repeated people, organizations, products, places, events, or topics, it can usually be turned into a usable entity file. The main question is whether the data is structured enough to identify entities consistently and whether enough context exists to resolve ambiguous names.
acceptedAnswer.description: Usually yes, if the data has identifiable entities and enough context to resolve ambiguity.

description: Usually yes, if the data has identifiable entities and enough context to resolve ambiguity.
